summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the Publish/Draft feature for Blog CMS. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed including draft/publish toggle, status badges, and full workflow (create draft → verify hidden → publish → verify visible).

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - dev tools warning related to internal React rendering, not breaking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning about span inside option element persists from iteration_2 - cosmetic issue, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed draft/published posts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Publish/Draft feature fully implemented and tested. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_draft_publish_feature.py covers all status-related API endpoints. Key behaviors: 1) New posts default to 'draft', 2) Draft posts hidden from public GET /api/blog/posts and /api/blog/posts/:slug (returns 404), 3) Admin can see all posts with include_drafts=true + passcode header, 4) Status toggle in UI switches between amber (draft) and green (published) styling.

features_tested.new_post_defaults_to_draft: PASS - Creating post without status field defaults to 'draft'
features_tested.draft_posts_hidden_from_public: PASS - Draft posts do NOT appear on GET /api/blog/posts
features_tested.draft_slug_returns_404: PASS - GET /api/blog/posts/:slug returns 404 for draft posts
features_tested.admin_sees_all_posts: PASS - GET /api/blog/posts?include_drafts=true with passcode returns all posts
features_tested.include_drafts_requires_passcode: PASS - include_drafts=true without passcode still hides drafts
features_tested.published_posts_visible_everywhere: PASS - Published posts visible in public and admin views
features_tested.status_toggle_ui: PASS - Toggle button switches between Draft (amber) and Published (green)
features_tested.status_badge_sidebar: PASS - Posts show correct status badge (amber=draft, green=published)
features_tested.status_preserved_on_update: PASS - Updating other fields preserves status correctly
features_tested.status_change_workflow: PASS - Changing draft→published makes post visible on public blog
features_tested.seed_data_backfill: PASS - Seed post 'Designing a Regal Wedding Experience' backfilled to 'published'

backend_api_tests.GET /api/blog/posts?include_drafts=true: PASS - Returns all posts with valid passcode
backend_api_tests.Backfill migration: PASS - Posts without status field get 'published'
